scripts.kill:3000: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const out=execSync('netstat -ano -p tcp',{encoding:'utf8'});const pids=[...new Set(out.split(/\r?\n/).filter(l=>l.includes(':3000')&&l.includes('LISTENING')).map(l=>l.trim().split(/\s+/).pop()).filter(Boolean))];if(!pids.length){console.log('Port 3000 is already free');process.exit(0);}for(const pid of pids){try{execSync(`taskkill /F /PID ${pid}`,{stdio:'ignore'});}catch{}}console.log('Freed port 3000 (killed PIDs: '+pids.join(', ')+')');}catch(e){console.log('Port cleanup skipped:',e.message);}"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill:3000 && npm run clean:dev && next dev -H 0.0.0.0 -p 3000
